description: Default MCP server and plugin configurations for OpenCode

exa.description: Web search - built-in to Oh My OpenCode
exa.notes: Similar to opencode-websearch-cited but built into oh-my-opencode

context7.description: Fetches up-to-date official documentation for libraries

grep-app.description: Ultra-fast code search across GitHub repos

plugins.NOTE: Add plugins to opencode.json plugin array. Order matters - opencode-websearch-cited should be LAST.

opencode-pty.description: Interactive PTY management - run background processes, send input, read output with regex filtering

setup.step2: Add to plugin array in opencode.json: "opencode-pty"

opencode-agent-skills.description: Dynamic skills plugin - auto-discovers skills from project, user, and plugin directories

setup.step2: Add to plugin array in opencode.json: "opencode-agent-skills"

opencode-supermemory.description: Persistent memory - agent remembers context across sessions (cloud-based)

setup.step2: Add to plugin array in opencode.json: "opencode-supermemory"

superlocalmemory.description: 100% local AI memory - no cloud, no API keys. Alternative to Supermemory

setup.step3: Choose mode: A (local-only), B (local Ollama), or C (cloud LLM)
setup.NOTE: Mode A: 100% local, no cloud calls, 74.8% on LoCoMo

alternatives.modeA: Local Guardian - zero cloud, EU AI Act compliant
alternatives.modeC: Full Power - uses cloud LLM for max accuracy

openmemory.description: Local persistent memory store - self-hosted, SQLite/Postgres

setup.step3: Configure: Uses local SQLite by default

features: Multi-sector memory (episodic, semantic, procedural, emotional, reflective)

superpowers.description: Software development workflow with composable skills

setup.step1: Add to plugin array in opencode.json: "superpowers@git+https://github.com/obra/superpowers.git"
setup.step3: Verify: ask 'Tell me about your superpowers'

ohMyOpenCodeComparison.description: Comparison with oh-my-opencode (omo) plugin for reference

opencode-websearch-cited.description: LLM-grounded web search with inline citations

setup.NOTE: Add LAST in plugin list to avoid impacting other plugins' auth process
setup.step3: Configure websearch_cited model in provider options

oh-my-openagent.description: Full agent harness - similar to oh-my-opencode (omo). Has built-in skills, MCPs, and agent orchestration

setup.NOTE: Oh My OpenCode is a full harness plugin. Use instead of or alongside other plugins.

alternatives: Use alongside other plugins (compatibility mode exists)

memoryComparison.description: Compare memory options for your use case

pros: Easy setup - just add API key
cloud_based.bestFor: Quick start, don't mind cloud storage

cons: Limited to local LLM if needed

pros: Uses local Ollama for better answers
cons: Requires Ollama setup for Mode B
hybrid.bestFor: Want local but need LLM assistance
